_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA) of publicly available expression data...revealed a YAP conserved signature as one of the top significantly enriched oncogenic gene sets in Molecular Signatures Database (MSigDB) in MPNSTs
details: Successfully identified YAP conserved signature as one of the top significantly enriched oncogenic gene sets in MPNSTs compared with normal nerves or NF1-neurofibromas
